member.name: M:SubscriptionBillingAPI.API.Controllers.AuthController.Register(SubscriptionBillingAPI.Application.DTOs.Auth.RegisterRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Register a new user account.

member.name: M:SubscriptionBillingAPI.API.Controllers.AuthController.Login(SubscriptionBillingAPI.Application.DTOs.Auth.LoginRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Authenticate and receive a JWT token.

member.name: M:SubscriptionBillingAPI.API.Controllers.PlansController.GetAll(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get all subscription plans.

member.name: M:SubscriptionBillingAPI.API.Controllers.PlansController.GetById(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get a subscription plan by ID.

member.name: M:SubscriptionBillingAPI.API.Controllers.PlansController.Create(SubscriptionBillingAPI.Application.DTOs.Plans.CreatePlanRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Create a new subscription plan. (Admin only)

member.name: M:SubscriptionBillingAPI.API.Controllers.PlansController.Update(System.Guid,SubscriptionBillingAPI.Application.DTOs.Plans.UpdatePlanRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Update an existing subscription plan. (Admin only)

member.name: M:SubscriptionBillingAPI.API.Controllers.PlansController.Delete(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Delete a subscription plan. (Admin only)

member.name: M:SubscriptionBillingAPI.API.Controllers.StripeWebhookController.HandleWebhook(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Stripe webhook endpoint. Verifies signatures and dispatches events.

member.name: M:SubscriptionBillingAPI.API.Controllers.SubscriptionsController.Subscribe(SubscriptionBillingAPI.Application.DTOs.Subscriptions.SubscribeRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Start a new subscription by creating a Stripe Checkout Session.

member.name: M:SubscriptionBillingAPI.API.Controllers.SubscriptionsController.Cancel(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Cancel a subscription at the end of the current billing period.

member.name: M:SubscriptionBillingAPI.API.Controllers.SubscriptionsController.Upgrade(System.Guid,SubscriptionBillingAPI.Application.DTOs.Subscriptions.UpgradeRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Upgrade a subscription to a new plan via a new Stripe Checkout Session.

member.name: M:SubscriptionBillingAPI.API.Controllers.SubscriptionsController.Pause(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Pause an active subscription.

member.name: M:SubscriptionBillingAPI.API.Controllers.SubscriptionsController.GetById(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get a specific subscription by ID.

member.name: M:SubscriptionBillingAPI.API.Controllers.SubscriptionsController.GetMySubscriptions(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get all subscriptions for the current user.

member.name: M:SubscriptionBillingAPI.API.Controllers.UsageController.GetMyUsage(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns current user's usage stats vs plan limits for the current month.

member.name: M:SubscriptionBillingAPI.API.Controllers.UsageController.TrackUsage(SubscriptionBillingAPI.Application.DTOs.Usage.TrackUsageRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Explicitly track a specific usage event (e.g. "ProjectCreated").

member.name: T:SubscriptionBillingAPI.API.Filters.QuotaEnforcementFilter
member.summary: Action filter that enforces usage quotas before allowing access to the action. Checks if the user has exceeded their Plan.MaxRequests for the current month. Returns 429 Too Many Requests if exceeded.

member.name: T:SubscriptionBillingAPI.API.Filters.SubscriptionAccessFilter
member.summary: Action filter that checks the user's subscription status before allowing access. Blocks access if the user has no active subscription, or if their subscription is Suspended or Expired. Allows access during GracePeriod.

member.name: T:Program
member.summary: Auto-generated public partial Program class for top-level statement apps.

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Type)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a type. Example: T:Namespace.Outer+Inner`1 becomes T:Namespace.Outer.Inner`1

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Reflection.PropertyInfo)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a property. Example: P:Namespace.ContainingType.PropertyName or for an indexer P:Namespace.ContainingType.Item(System.Int32)

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Type,System.String)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a property given its container type and property name. Example: P:Namespace.ContainingType.PropertyName

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Reflection.MethodInfo)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a method (or constructor). For example: M:Namespace.ContainingType.MethodName(ParamType1,ParamType2)~ReturnType M:Namespace.ContainingType.#ctor(ParamType)

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.GetTypeDocId(System.Type,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Generates a documentation ID string for a type. This method handles nested types (replacing '+' with '.'), generic types, arrays, pointers, by-ref types, and generic parameters. The flag controls whether constructed generic type arguments are emitted, while controls whether the generic arity marker (e.g. "`1") is appended.

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.NormalizeDocId(System.String)
member.summary: Normalizes a documentation comment ID to match the compiler-style format. Strips the return type suffix for ordinary methods but retains it for conversion operators.
member.param: The documentation comment ID to normalize.
